data.title: Stock futures rise ahead of Powell's Jackson Hole speech. Dow +0.30%, S&P 500 +0.21%, Nasdaq 100 +0.12%, Russell 2000 +0.48%. Fed likely to cut rates.
data.description: U.S. stock futures saw a rise following a previous decline, with major benchmark indices showing higher numbers. Investors are anticipating comments on labor market, inflation, and interest rates from Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell's speech at the Jackson Hole Economic Policy Symposium. The symposium's theme is "Labor Markets in Transition: Demographics, Productivity, and Macroeconomic Policy." The 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.34% and the two-year bond stood at 3.79%. The CME Group's FedWatch tool projects a 71.3% likelihood of the Federal Reserve cutting interest rates in September. Futures showed positive changes for Dow Jones (0.30%), S&P 500 (0.21%), Nasdaq 100 (0.12%), and Russell 2000 (0.48%). The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF, tracking S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 respectively, rose in premarket trading. On the previous day, most S&P 500 sectors closed negatively except for energy and materials. Walmart Inc. saw a 4.5% drop in shares after mixed second-quarter results, while Coty Inc. shares dipped by 22% post fourth-quarter adjusted EPS miss. Economic data showed U.S. initial jobless claims rose to 235,000 and existing home sales climbed by 2% in July. S&P Global services PMI stood at 55.4, and manufacturing PMI climbed to 53.3. Full story accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: GWM opens Brazil plant in São Paulo, producing H6, H9, and POER models, showcasing quality and tech innovation.
data.description: In Iracemápolis, São Paulo, GWM has officially opened its Brazil Plant, marking the company’s inaugural full-process manufacturing center in South America. The facility will focus on producing key models such as the GWM HAVAL H6, GWM HAVAL H9, and GWM POER 2.4T pickup initially. Equipped with cutting-edge assembly lines and advanced automation, this plant emphasizes GWM’s dedication to maintaining high global standards and embracing technological advancements.

data.title: BJ's Wholesale Club memberships reach record high, but sales miss expectations. Q2 earnings per share: $1.14 (beat estimates $1.09). Comparable club sales fell by 0.3% YoY, but rose by 2.3% excluding gasoline. Quarterly sales: $5.38 billion (+3.4% YoY). Shares trading lower.
data.description: BJ's Wholesale Club Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: BJ) saw a decline in premarket trading following the release of their second-quarter results. The company reported adjusted earnings per share of $1.14 for the quarter, surpassing the analyst consensus of $1.09. Comparable club sales dropped by 0.3% year-over-year, primarily due to decreased retail fuel prices. However, excluding gasoline, comparable club sales experienced a 2.3% increase, attributed to a rise in foot traffic. Quarterly sales totaled $5.38 billion, indicating a 3.4% growth compared to the previous year, falling short of market expectations.

data.title: Inspira Technologies gets U.S. Patent for ART500, crucial for $20B market. Novel core tech leads the way.
data.description: Inspira™ Technologies OXY B.H.N. Ltd., based in Ra'anana, Israel, announced on August 22, 2025, that they have obtained U.S. Patent approval for their low flow rates extracorporeal oxygenation system and associated methods. This patent covers the foundational technology of the ART500 device, a crucial component in Inspira’s plans to enter the $20 billion advanced respiratory support market. The patent includes 16 unique claims that have been identified as innovative by the authorities.

data.title: Liberty Defense partners with Gold Standard Media LLC to raise investor awareness. Marketing agreement dated Aug 15, 2025.
data.description: In Wilmington, Massachusetts on August 22, 2025, Liberty Defense Holdings Ltd. (TSXV: SCAN, OTCQB: LDDFF, FSE:E30), a prominent technology company specializing in AI-powered advanced detection solutions for hidden weapons and threats, disclosed a marketing deal made on August 15, 2025, with Gold Standard Media, LLC (“GSM”) and associated entities. This agreement aims to boost investor awareness of Liberty. The agreement's finalization is contingent upon approval from the TSX Venture Exchange.

data.title: El Salvador: 350 female students graduate with Bitcoin Diplomas, part of broader push for crypto literacy.
data.description: Dozens of students in El Salvador completed the Bitcoin Diploma course, part of the government's initiative to educate citizens about cryptocurrency. In a post by the Ministry of Education, it was revealed that 350 female students graduated from the Instituto Nacional General Francisco Morazán after completing the training in Bitcoin. The initiative is led by the National Bitcoin Office, with the education minister, Karla Trigueros, attending the graduation ceremony. The program has now been extended to other institutions in the country with materials adapted to the national context. The Bitcoin Diploma was created by Mi Primer Bitcoin, offering free education materials on Bitcoin, covering topics like the history of money and fiat currencies.

data.title: FSOC market forecast report predicts future systems by DARPA, China's 300km quantum communication.
data.description: A report titled "Free-Space Optical Communication (FSOC) - Market and Technology Forecast to 2033" has recently been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The study delves into the potential of FSOC in revolutionizing defense communications. The research assesses its feasibility in military settings, known for high stakes and intricate challenges. FSOC technology provides secure and high-throughput data transfer capabilities. This report analyzes the market and technological trends related to FSOC until 2033, highlighting its potential impact on defense communications.

data.title: RXO (NYSE: RXO) to present at two investor conferences: Jefferies Industrials Conference in NYC on Sept. 4, 8:10am EDT, and Morgan Stanley 13th Annual Laguna Conference in Laguna Beach, Calif. on Sept. 10, 1:45pm EDT. Live webcasts and replays available.
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina, RXO (NYSE: RXO) revealed that Chairman and CEO Drew Wilkerson and Chief Strategy Officer Jared Weisfeld are set to attend investor conferences. They will be participating in the Jefferies Industrials Conference in New York City on Thursday, Sept. 4 at 8:10 a.m. EDT and the Morgan Stanley 13th Annual Laguna Conference in Laguna Beach, California on Wednesday, Sept. 10 at 1:45 p.m. EDT. Those interested can access live webcasts and replays of these presentations.

data.title: Adam Posar appointed as Senior VP of Sales at flyExclusive, leading retail strategy for private jet charter.
data.description: In Kinston, North Carolina, flyExclusive (NYSEAM: FLYX), a top provider of luxury private jet charters, revealed the selection of Adam Posar as the new Senior Vice President of Sales. Posar will oversee retail sales strategies, client interactions, and expansion efforts for the company's range of private aviation services. With over 15 years of successful revenue generation experience, Posar aims to boost business for flyExclusive.

data.title: Hudson Global declaring $0.025 cash dividend per share for 10% Series A Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock on Aug 22, 2025. Record date - Sep 1, 2025; payment date - Sep 10, 2025.
data.description: In Old Greenwich, Connecticut on August 22, 2025, Hudson Global, Inc. (Nasdaq: HSON, HSONP), a global total talent solutions company, declared a partial cash dividend of $0.025 per share for holders of its 10% Series A Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock. This dividend applies from the stock's issuance date on August 22, 2025. The record date for this dividend is September 1, 2025, and the payment date is set for September 10, 2025.

data.title: "4D Imaging Radar in Autonomous Vehicles market valued at USD 2 billion in 2024, projected to reach USD 10 billion by 2030 with 38% CAGR."
data.description: A report on the 4D imaging radar in autonomous vehicles has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This market, crucial for automotive innovation, is leading the development of Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS) and autonomous vehicles (AVs). In 2024, it was valued at around USD 2 billion, with estimates suggesting it will grow to USD 10 billion by 2030, showcasing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 38%.

data.title: Mercurity Fintech sees increase in institutional ownership post Russell 2000® inclusion, with BlackRock, State Street, and Vanguard among investors.
data.description: On August 22, 2025, a New York-based company, Mercurity Fintech Holding Inc. (MFH), which is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol MFH, disclosed that numerous institutional investors have reported their ownership in the company in recent regulatory submissions. MFH operates as a fintech group utilizing blockchain technology.

data.title: CleanCore Solutions, Inc. (ZONE) achieves record revenue in fiscal year 2025: $1.1 million in Q4 and $2.1 million in full year.
data.description: In the United States, revenue for the fourth quarter surpassed $1.1 million, marking an increase of 29% from the previous year, with full-year revenue reaching $2.1 million.

data.title: QCR Holdings, Inc. declares a $0.06 cash dividend per share, payable on Oct 3, 2025, to stockholders of record on Sept 18, 2025.
data.description: On August 20, 2025, QCR Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: QCRH) based in Moline, Illinois, declared a cash dividend of $0.06 per share. The dividend is set to be paid on October 3, 2025, to shareholders of record as of September 18, 2025.

data.title: Solowin launches Dubai center, seeks asset management license from DIFC, continuing Middle East expansion post Saudi deal.
data.description: On August 22, 2025, Solowin Holdings (NASDAQ: SWIN), a prominent financial services company specializing in traditional and digital assets, revealed the inauguration of its Dubai Operations Center. The company also announced its application for a Category 3C asset management license from the Dubai International Financial Centre (DIFC), a renowned financial hub in the Middle East. This development follows Solowin's recent partnership with CITIC Construction on August 20, 2025, to enhance financial technology infrastructure in Saudi Arabia. These initiatives highlight Solowin's rapid growth in compliant financial services across the Middle East region.
